full_text:
Cheng Wu 程武
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Wu (程武). Served Wei. Son of Cheng Yu. Advised Xiahou Mao against Zhao Yun. Cheng Wu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cheng Wu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
